name: CVF Governance Context Packet Builder
owner: CVF context and work-transfer governance surface
purpose: Help future agents assemble bounded context packets with trusted sources, allowed files, untrusted data labels, and receipt links before package-like work begins.
useWhen: A worker or dispatcher must carry only the relevant trusted sources, scope boundaries, source verification, and receipt references into a bounded task.
doNotUseWhen: The task is trivial, no governed work transfer is occurring, or full package/runtime activation is being claimed.
executionConstraints: metadata-only candidate; does not create a runtime context loader or memory injection behavior
acceptanceEvidence: future promotion requires package instance evidence showing reduced context contamination
authorityCeiling: metadata-only context guidance; cannot promote external or stale context to authority
permissions: read metadata and cited governed source artifacts only
rollback: delete this registry entry and regenerate the skill index if reviewer rejects AGSK-T7
safeStop: if trusted and untrusted context cannot be separated, stop and require source clarification
capabilityBoundary: no runtime memory read, no external-agent context injection, no package body, no SKILL.md
resolverBehavior: metadata-only; resolver returns identity and selector fields; does not open any SKILL.md or instruction body
loaderBoundary: loading this metadata never grants authority to inject context, trust external data, or bypass source verification
adapterContract: N/A with reason: external CLI/MCP adapter not authored in AGSK-T7
adapterEvidence: N/A with reason: no adapter implemented in AGSK-T7
externalMutationBoundary: no external mutation permitted until a separate ASSF adapter work order is accepted
shellAssumptions: no shell execution required for metadata-only candidate
